new_boilerplate:
## Late Work Policy

Work submitted by a student as makeup work for an excused absence is not considered late work and is exempt from the late work policy (Student Rule 7).

### Communications

To maintain course integrity, all communications must be conducted through Canvas (via a message). The instructor will not respond to course-related questions via email or chat.
